_comment: ISSA-2: two proposed_series_goals share the same id. Each goal individually satisfies the structural tier; the cross-field validator (validateInterSeriesScopingArtifact) rejects via the LOCAL array_field_distinct helper.

proposed_series_goals.description: First entry with the duplicated id.
Second entry with the same id — ISSA-2 violation surfaces at the cross-field tier.
